headline: Assessing Intuit (INTU) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent price performance and business profile With no single headline event driving the move, Intuit (INTU) has been trading through a mixed period, including a recent 3% one day decline and a negative return over the past 3 months. For context, the company reports annual revenue of US$20.1b and net income of US$4.3b, supported by four segments that span small business tools, consumer tax preparation, personal finance services, and professional tax software. See our latest analysis for...
